answer:
The credit facility allows up to $30 million for letters of credit. As of December 31, 2017, there was $25.6 million outstanding under this facility, plus an additional $22.8 million under a separate uncommitted letter of credit facility. The utilization of the allowed $30 million limit is \( \frac{25.6}{30} \times 100\% = 85.33\% \).

\boxed{85.33\%}
